auth.emailPasswordRequired: Please enter your email and password.
auth.serverWakingUp: Server is waking up (cold start) — please wait a few seconds and try again.
auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkInboxSubtitle: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link. It expires in 1 hour.

onboarding.welcomeSub: Your private, AI-powered recovery companion. Let's set up your profile in just a few steps.
onboarding.roleForSomeoneSub: Supporting a friend or family member
onboarding.addictionsHeading:
What would you like
to work on?
onboarding.addictionsSub: Select all that apply. You can change this later.
onboarding.stageSub: Be honest — there's no wrong answer.
onboarding.saveFailed: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

home.encouragement: Every journey starts with day 1 — you've got this! 💪
home.addFirstTracker: Tap + to add your first tracker

chat.title: AI Coach
chat.dailyLimit: Daily limit reached — tap to upgrade
chat.dial112: Not sure which number to call? Dial 112 — works in 190+ countries.
chat.voiceUnavailableMsg: Voice input is available in the full app build (App Store / Google Play), not in Expo Go.

sos.title: Craving SOS
sos.sub: Cravings last 5 minutes. You can do this.
sos.breathe: Take slow deep breaths. Focus on what is in front of you right now.
sos.wellDoneMsg: You resisted! Every moment of strength matters.
sos.itsOkayMsg: Every setback is a setup for a comeback. Tomorrow is a new day.
sos.dial112Note:
Not sure which number to call?
Dial 112 — works in most countries and connects you to local emergency services.
offlineSteps: Take 5 slow deep breaths — inhale 4 counts, hold 4, exhale 4.
Drink a large glass of cold water slowly.
Go outside or open a window — fresh air disrupts the craving reflex.
Call or text someone you trust right now.
This craving will peak and pass in 5–10 minutes. Just hold on.

progress.title: Progress
progress.reportDesc: Select journal entries to include. Your streak, mood chart, and stability score are always included.
progress.noNotes: No journal entries with notes found. The report will still include your stats and mood chart.
progress.premiumFeatureMsg: Therapist reports are a premium feature. Upgrade to generate unlimited reports.
progress.reportError: Could not generate report. Please try again.

trackers.title: My Trackers
trackers.noTrackersDesc: Add your first addiction tracker to start counting your sober days.

logs.title: Log entry
logs.sosAlertMsg: Your personalised steps are shown below.
logs.loggedSlipped: It's okay — tomorrow is a new day.

profile.title: Profile
profile.musicSub: Calming music while you use the app
profile.musicUnavailableSub: Place background.mp3 in assets/sounds/ to enable
profile.musicMissing: audio file missing — add assets/sounds/background.mp3 and rebuild
profile.readAloudSub: AI Coach speaks the response after each message
profile.dailyEmailSub: Reminder at 9am to log your day
profile.ageRequiredMsg: You must confirm you are 18+ to add this content.
profile.supportersDesc: Invite a trusted family member or friend to see your progress. They'll see only what you choose to share.
profile.inviteDesc: They'll receive a code to view your progress in Bravely Path.
profile.inviteMsg: I'd like to share my recovery progress with you on Bravely Path. Use this invite code to follow my journey: {{code}}
profile.shareCodeMsg: Use this code to follow my Bravely Path recovery journey: {{code}}
